title: Validar CPF
prompt: Escreva a lógica de validação dos dígitos verificadores de um CPF.
modelAnswer:
01 WS-CPF        PIC 9(11).
       01 WS-CPF-R REDEFINES WS-CPF.
          05 WS-DIG PIC 9 OCCURS 11.
       01 WS-SOMA PIC 9(5).
       01 WS-RESTO PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-DV1  PIC 9.
       01 WS-DV2  PIC 9.
       01 WS-I    PIC 9(2).
       01 WS-MULT PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SOMA.
           MOVE 10 TO WS-MULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > 9
               COMPUTE WS-SOMA = WS-SOMA +
                   WS-DIG(WS-I) * WS-MULT
               SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-MULT
           END-PERFORM.
           COMPUTE WS-RESTO =
               FUNCTION MOD(WS-SOMA 11).
           IF WS-RESTO < 2
               MOVE 0 TO WS-DV1
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-DV1 = 11 - WS-RESTO
           END-IF.
           IF WS-DV1 = WS-DIG(10)
               DISPLAY 'PRIMEIRO DV OK'
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'CPF INVALIDO'
           END-IF.
           STOP RUN.

title: Master-Transaction
prompt: Implemente o padrão Master-Transaction Update para atualizar um cadastro.
modelAnswer:
* Lê MASTER e TRANSACAO (ambos ordenados por chave)
      * Gera MASTER-ATUALIZADO
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           OPEN INPUT ARQ-MASTER ARQ-TRANS
                OUTPUT ARQ-MASTER-NOVO.
           READ ARQ-MASTER AT END SET EOF-M TO TRUE.
           READ ARQ-TRANS AT END SET EOF-T TO TRUE.
           PERFORM UNTIL EOF-M AND EOF-T
               EVALUATE TRUE
                   WHEN CHAVE-M < CHAVE-T OR EOF-T
                       WRITE REG-NOVO FROM REG-MASTER
                       READ ARQ-MASTER AT END
                           SET EOF-M TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                   WHEN CHAVE-M = CHAVE-T
                       PERFORM APLICA-TRANSACAO
                       WRITE REG-NOVO FROM REG-MASTER
                       READ ARQ-MASTER AT END
                           SET EOF-M TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                       READ ARQ-TRANS AT END
                           SET EOF-T TO TRUE
                       END-READ
                   WHEN CHAVE-M > CHAVE-T OR EOF-M
                       PERFORM TRATA-INCLUSAO
                       READ ARQ-TRANS AT END
                           SET EOF-T TO TRUE
                       END-READ
               END-EVALUATE
           END-PERFORM.
           CLOSE ARQ-MASTER ARQ-TRANS ARQ-MASTER-NOVO.
           STOP RUN.

title: CICS CRUD Completo
prompt: Escreva a PROCEDURE DIVISION de um programa CICS que faz consulta; inclusão e alteração de cliente em VSAM.
modelAnswer:
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN EIBCALEN = 0
                   PERFORM 1000-PRIMEIRO-ACESSO
               WHEN OTHER
                   PERFORM 2000-RETORNO
           END-EVALUATE.
           EXEC CICS RETURN
               TRANSID('CLI1')
               COMMAREA(WS-COMMAREA)
               LENGTH(LENGTH OF WS-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.
       1000-PRIMEIRO-ACESSO.
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') ERASE END-EXEC.
       2000-RETORNO.
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') INTO(MAPCLI-I)
           END-EXEC.
           EVALUATE EIBAID
               WHEN DFHPF3
                   EXEC CICS RETURN END-EXEC
               WHEN DFHENTER
                   EVALUATE WS-ACAO
                       WHEN 'C'
                           PERFORM 3000-CONSULTAR
                       WHEN 'I'
                           PERFORM 4000-INCLUIR
                       WHEN 'A'
                           PERFORM 5000-ALTERAR
                   END-EVALUATE
           END-EVALUATE.
       3000-CONSULTAR.
           EXEC CICS READ FILE('CADCLI')
               INTO(WS-REG-CLI)
               LENGTH(WS-LEN)
               RIDFLD(WS-CPF)
               RESP(WS-RESP)
           END-EXEC.
           IF WS-RESP = DFHRESP(NORMAL)
               PERFORM MONTA-TELA-DADOS
           ELSE
               MOVE 'CLIENTE NAO ENCONTRADO'
                   TO MSG-TELAO
           END-IF.
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP('MAPCLI')
               MAPSET('MSCLI') DATAONLY END-EXEC.

title: DB2 Batch COBOL
prompt: Escreva programa COBOL/DB2 batch que processe cursor com COMMIT a cada 1000 registros.
modelAnswer:
WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
           EXEC SQL INCLUDE SQLCA END-EXEC.
       01 WS-CONT     PIC 9(7) COMP VALUE 0.
       01 WS-COMMIT   PIC 9(7) COMP VALUE 1000.
       01 WS-CONTA    PIC S9(9) COMP.
       01 WS-SALDO    PIC S9(13)V99 COMP-3.
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           EXEC SQL
               DECLARE C1 CURSOR WITH HOLD FOR
               SELECT CONTA; SALDO
               FROM CONTAS
               WHERE STATUS = 'A'
               FOR UPDATE OF SALDO
           END-EXEC.
           EXEC SQL OPEN C1 END-EXEC.
           PERFORM UNTIL SQLCODE = 100
               EXEC SQL FETCH C1
                   INTO :WS-CONTA; :WS-SALDO
               END-EXEC
               IF SQLCODE = 0
                   COMPUTE WS-SALDO = WS-SALDO *
                       1.005
                   EXEC SQL UPDATE CONTAS
                       SET SALDO = :WS-SALDO
                       WHERE CURRENT OF C1
                   END-EXEC
                   ADD 1 TO WS-CONT
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-CONT;
                       WS-COMMIT) = 0
                       EXEC SQL COMMIT END-EXEC
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           EXEC SQL COMMIT END-EXEC.
           EXEC SQL CLOSE C1 END-EXEC.
           DISPLAY 'REGISTROS: ' WS-CONT.
           STOP RUN.

title: Subquery - efeito em produção em Médio
prompt: Encontre clientes com saldo acima da média.
modelAnswer:
SELECT CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO
FROM CLIENTES
WHERE CLI_SALDO > (
    SELECT AVG(CLI_SALDO)
    FROM CLIENTES
    WHERE CLI_STATUS = 'A'
)
ORDER BY CLI_SALDO DESC;

title: CASE Expression - efeito em produção em Médio
prompt: Use CASE para classificar clientes por faixa de saldo.
modelAnswer:
SELECT CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO;
    CASE
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 100000 THEN 'PREMIUM'
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 10000  THEN 'GOLD'
        WHEN CLI_SALDO >= 1000   THEN 'SILVER'
        ELSE 'BASICO'
    END AS CATEGORIA
FROM CLIENTES
WHERE CLI_STATUS = 'A'
ORDER BY CLI_SALDO DESC;

title: CTE e ROW_NUMBER
prompt: Use CTE com ROW_NUMBER para pegar os top 5 clientes.

title: LEFT OUTER JOIN
prompt: Liste todos os clientes e suas contas (inclusive sem conta).

title: Stored Procedure - efeito em produção em Avançado
prompt: Crie uma stored procedure de transferência entre contas.

title: Trigger Auditoria
prompt: Crie um trigger que registre alterações de saldo.

title: MERGE Statement
prompt: Use MERGE para sincronizar tabela de staging com produção.
modelAnswer:
MERGE INTO CLIENTES_PROD P
USING CLIENTES_STAGING S
    ON P.CLI_CPF = S.CLI_CPF
WHEN MATCHED AND S.CLI_STATUS = 'D' THEN
    DELETE
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        P.CLI_NOME = S.CLI_NOME;
        P.CLI_SALDO = S.CLI_SALDO;
        P.CLI_STATUS = S.CLI_STATUS
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (CLI_CPF; CLI_NOME; CLI_SALDO; CLI_STATUS)
    VALUES (S.CLI_CPF; S.CLI_NOME; S.CLI_SALDO;
            S.CLI_STATUS);

title: JCL Ex 53
prompt: Escreva JCL para concatenar dois datasets (exercício 53).

title: DB2 Ex 54
prompt: Escreva uma query com HAVING (exercício 54).
modelAnswer:
SELECT CLI_STATUS; COUNT(*) AS TOTAL
FROM CLIENTES
GROUP BY CLI_STATUS
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY TOTAL DESC;

title: COBOL Ex 55
prompt: Escreva um parágrafo COBOL que calcule o fatorial de um número (exercício 55).
modelAnswer:
01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

01 WS-NUM PIC 9(2) VALUE 5.
       01 WS-FAT PIC 9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I   PIC 9(2).
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM
               MULTIPLY WS-I BY WS-FAT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
           STOP RUN.

               UNTIL WS-I > WS-NUM

           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY 'FATORIAL DE ' WS-NUM ' = ' WS-FAT.
